titleStmt.title: SII 38.382: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 382. (A.R. No. 382 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the north wall, second prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Achyutayyadēva-Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1458, Manmatha, Mīna, śu. di. 10, Friday, Tiruvōṇam = March, 1536 A.D. However, the cyclic year was, Durmukha, and the tithi being ba. 10.

summary.p: Damaged. Contains the panegyric portion and also some land grant. Certain goddess shrine (Nāchchiyār kōyil) is mentioned. Other details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu sva(sva)stiśrīmaṉ makāmaṇṭalecura metiṉimicura kaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷuva Arikara Irāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikku tappu
varāyarkaṇṭaṉ muvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭukoṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu kuṭātāṉ tulukkataḷavipāṭaṉ pūṟuvateṣa(ṣa)ṇa
paccimauttaracatta camuttirātipati śrīvirappiṟatāpa Accutaiteva makā Irāyar piṟutivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa
cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 5 10 8 mel cellā niṉṟa maṉmatavaruṣattu miṉanāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu tecamiyum cukkiṟavāramum peṟṟa
tiruvoṇattu nāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟak koṭṭattu melkuṉṟanāṭu murukamaṅkalapaṟṟu tevastāṉa
ttiṇecurar koraveṉ
raṉṉiṭa kiṟāmam Āṉa Araiy naṉperi riyarā luta
tuttayeṉk kiṟāmam Āka Añcu ya nācciyār koyilile
cevittu yintak kiṟāmattai A m Āka nañcai puñcaiṉāṟ pāṟkellai Āka nirrakamum puttirapavuttiraparamparai Āka Añcu perumāṉuincomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.382 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
